hero.eyebrow: A reference guide for multilingual grammar
hero.body: Every grammar concept, three languages, one view. From articles to zero copulas — understand how Spanish, English and Chinese build meaning differently.

languages.topicDesc: Each topic shows how {language} handles the concept, with examples and common pitfalls.
languages.heroDesc: Explore {count} grammar topics for {language}. Each concept explained with real examples — no comparisons, just the rules that matter.

topics.title: Grammar concepts
topics.subtitle: Each topic explains the idea, then shows how Spanish, English and Chinese implement it.
topics.heroDesc: {count} grammar concepts documented across Spanish, English, and Chinese.

guides.heroDesc: Audience-oriented guides for learners and teachers.

cheatsheets.heroDesc: Quick-reference tables for common grammar patterns.

learningPaths.heroDesc: A structured journey from first concepts to advanced usage. Follow the stages in order, or jump to the topic you need.
learningPaths.stageBeginnerDesc: Start here. These concepts form the bedrock of the language.
learningPaths.stageIntermediateDesc: Expand your range. Connect ideas and express more nuance.
learningPaths.stageAdvancedDesc: Refine your command. Handle subtle distinctions and complex structures.

pagefind.alt_search: No results for [SEARCH_TERM]. Showing results for [DIFFERENT_TERM] instead.

comparisons.title: Side-by-side comparison
comparisons.subtitle: A quick look at how one concept differs across languages.
comparisons.description: This is what Grammar Navigator does best. Every topic shows you the same grammar concept in all three languages at once — not as isolated rules, but as a single puzzle with three solutions.
comparisons.whyCompare1Body: See the same concept across all three languages on a single page. No need to switch between grammar books or websites.
comparisons.whyCompare2Body: Every explanation is backed by real phrases in Spanish, English and Chinese. Learn what works, not just rules.
comparisons.whyCompare3Body: Understand the traps that multilingual learners fall into — and why they happen when switching between languages.
comparisons.toolSubtitle: Pick a grammar topic and choose which languages to compare.
comparisons.selectLanguageToView: Select at least one language to view comparisons

howItWorks.title: How Grammar Navigator works
howItWorks.intro: Grammar Navigator is built around a simple idea: grammar is easier to understand when you see how different languages solve the same problem. Instead of learning three separate grammars, you learn one concept and compare three solutions.
howItWorks.step1Body: Start with a grammar idea — articles, pronouns, verb tenses — not a language.
howItWorks.step2Body: Read how Spanish, English and Chinese each handle the same idea.
howItWorks.step3Body: Use the comparison table to spot patterns and differences at a glance.
howItWorks.step4Body: Jump into any topic. No sign-up, no ads, no paywall — just clear comparisons.

footer.rights: An open grammar reference. Not a course — a map.
footer.cookieBanner: We use cookies to improve your experience and understand how the site is used.

landing.grammarDesc: Every grammar concept explained across languages. Instead of learning three separate grammars, learn one concept and compare three solutions.
landing.languagesDesc: Explore grammar organized by each language. Deep dives into Spanish, English, and Chinese grammar systems.
landing.vocabularyDesc: Build your vocabulary with curated word lists, common phrases, idiomatic expressions, and frequency-based learning.
landing.learningPathsDesc: Follow a structured path through grammar and vocabulary for each language. From beginner to advanced, one step at a time.
landing.flashcardsDesc: Reinforce what you learn with interactive flashcards. Flip, test, and master grammar, vocabulary, and phrases.
landing.howGrammar1Body: Start with a grammar idea — articles, pronouns, verb tenses — not a language.
landing.howGrammar2Body: Read how Spanish, English and Chinese each handle the same idea, with real examples.
landing.howGrammar3Body: Use the comparison table to spot patterns and differences at a glance.
landing.howGrammar4Body: Jump into individual topics or comparisons. No sign-up needed — just clear explanations.
landing.howLanguages1Body: Select Spanish, English, or Chinese to see grammar organized by that language alone.
landing.howLanguages2Body: Each language page contains the same concepts but framed within one grammar system.
landing.howLanguages3Body: No side-by-side tables. Just the rules, patterns, and examples for this language alone.
landing.howLanguages4Body: Deepen your understanding of one language while keeping the others within reach.
landing.howVocabulary1Body: Pick from Words, Phrases, Expressions, or Frequency Lists depending on what you need.
landing.howVocabulary2Body: Each list is organized by usefulness. Learn the most common words and phrases first.
landing.howVocabulary3Body: See translations, pronunciations, and usage examples side by side.
landing.howVocabulary4Body: Reinforce what you learn by flipping cards in the Flashcards section.
landing.howLearningPaths1Body: Choose a path for Spanish, English, or Chinese. Each path is tailored to that language.
landing.howLearningPaths2Body: Move through Foundations, Building Blocks, Connecting, Expressing, and Refining.
landing.howLearningPaths3Body: Each stage covers both grammar concepts and essential vocabulary for real progress.
landing.howLearningPaths4Body: Complete topics at your own pace. The path adapts to what you've already learned.
landing.howFlashcards1Body: Pick Grammar, Vocabulary, or Phrases. Each deck is focused on a specific skill.
landing.howFlashcards2Body: See the question, think of the answer, then click or tap to flip the card and check.
landing.howFlashcards3Body: Go through the deck at your own pace. Cards shuffle to keep your brain engaged.
landing.howFlashcards4Body: Review decks regularly. Spaced repetition helps move knowledge into long-term memory.

flashcards.demoInstruction: Click the card below to see the answer. This is how every flashcard in Grammar Navigator works.
flashcards.clickToFlip: Click or press Space to flip
flashcards.clickToFlipBack: Click or press Space to flip back
flashcards.keyboardHint: ← → arrows to navigate · Space to flip
flashcards.demoQuestion: How do you form questions in Chinese without changing word order?
flashcards.demoAnswer: Add 吗 (ma) at the end of the statement.
flashcards.demoExample: 你去 = You go. 你去吗？ = Do you go?
flashcards.grammarDesc: Test your knowledge of grammar rules across all three languages. From articles to zero copulas.
flashcards.vocabularyDesc: Memorize words with spaced repetition. Words, translations, and example sentences.
flashcards.phrasesDesc: Practice common phrases and expressions. Build fluency one phrase at a time.
flashcards.grammarMetaDesc: Study grammar concepts with {count} interactive flashcards.

placeholders.noContent: Content will appear here as it is added.
placeholders.searchIndexMissing: Search index not available in development. Run npm run build to generate it.

error.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
